en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: a Liyusan Lima harem, a Kasede’an nu ’emanan, kay ta muzangiya!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: ai mu! kay ta i zinanuman.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: a Liyusan Telu nu ’emanan, kay ta mamaliya nu piya kare’alri nu ’emanan!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: a Kasede’an nu ’emanan, salrangan ku kani inani auwa i kiyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: maranger ku muta’, auwa ku i tavuniyan.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, nana ku tiyalr, auwa ku i tavuniyan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: karuwa ku mukuwa murasa ku lima?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: uri puwaludus ta lra, uwa lra nu haremay.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, nana ku tranguru’, kiyami ku semede’ nu piya kare’alri.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, kiyami ku za sasede’an nu masalr kana liyusan sa, auwa ku pana’uwa kana ising.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Sunay?

ab: nana tu tiyalr, ulra i tavuniyan i intaw.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kasang?

ab: sinsi, nana tu tukeraw i Kasang, semede’ harem.
en: Teacher, Kasang has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Sunay come?
She has a fever.
